records.question: Which universities named Imperial College London are located in the United Kingdom?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
WHERE university.university_name = 'Imperial College London' AND country.country_name = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T1.university_name = 'Imperial College London' AND T2.country_name = 'United Kingdom'

records.question: Which university is named exactly Trinity College Dublin and has related country, ranking, and year information?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university.university_name = 'Trinity College Dublin'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id INNER JOIN university_ranking_year AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.university_id INNER JOIN university_year AS T4 ON T1.id = T4.university_id WHERE T1.university_name = 'Trinity College Dublin'

records.question: Which universities named University of Victoria had exactly a 21.5 student-staff ratio, no more than 56.0% female students, no more than 11% international students, and at least 17581 students in years no later than 2012, with rankings from 2013 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_year.student_staff_ratio = 21.5 AND university_year.pct_female_students <= 56.0 AND university_year.pct_international_students <= 11 AND university_ranking_year.year <= 2013 AND university_year.year <= 2012 AND university_year.num_students >= 17581 AND university.university_name = 'University of Victoria'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN university_ranking_year AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.university_id INNER JOIN university_year AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.university_id WHERE T1.university_name = 'University of Victoria' AND T2.year <= 2013 AND T3.student_staff_ratio = 21.5 AND T3.pct_female_students <= 56.0 AND T3.pct_international_students <= 11 AND T3.year <= 2012 AND T3.num_students >= 17581

records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id INNER JOIN university_ranking_year AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.university_id WHERE T1.university_name = 'Wake Forest University' AND T2.country_name = 'United States of America' AND T3.year <= 2011

records.question: Which universities in the United States of America had a ranking score of at most 22.0 in 2015, with at least 26% international students and no more than 44% female students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_ranking_year.score <= 22.0 AND university_year.pct_international_students >= 26 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university_year.year = 2015 AND university_year.pct_female_students <= 44.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id INNER JOIN university_ranking_year AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.university_id INNER JOIN university_year AS T4 ON T1.id = T4.university_id WHERE T2.country_name = 'United States of America' AND T3.score <= 22.0 AND T4.pct_international_students >= 26 AND T4.year = 2015 AND T4.pct_female_students <= 44.0

records.question: Which universities named University of Pittsburgh in the United States have at least 26485 students, exactly 10% international students, at least 51% female students, and a ranking score of at most 32.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university.university_name = 'University of Pittsburgh' AND university_year.num_students >= 26485 AND university_year.pct_international_students = 10 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university_ranking_year.score <= 32.0 AND university_year.pct_female_students >= 51.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id INNER JOIN university_ranking_year AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.university_id INNER JOIN university_year AS T4 ON T1.id = T4.university_id WHERE T1.university_name = 'University of Pittsburgh' AND T2.country_name = 'United States of America' AND T3.score <= 32.0 AND T4.num_students >= 26485 AND T4.pct_international_students = 10 AND T4.pct_female_students >= 51.0

records.question: Which universities in the United States of America have a student staff ratio exactly equal to 13.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_year.student_staff_ratio = 13.0 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM university AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id INNER JOIN university_year AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.university_id WHERE T2.country_name = 'United States of America' AND T3.student_staff_ratio = 13.0
